descript.abstract: This dataset displays the approximate location of US Forest Service, Great American Outdoors Act (GAOA) projects. The data is refreshed on a nightly basis from the US Forest Service database of infrastructure projects which is stewarded by the individual National Forests and Grasslands.This dataset is a spatial data layer of points representing the approximate or general location where the project takes place. The point location is intended for use in small scale maps to indicate the general location of the projects across the country. The location data is maintained by staff on the individual National Forest or Grassland using the database of record. Because a project can be made up of many assets distributed across a land area, a single project location point will not always reflect the specific location and extent of the work in the project. The project detail data can be used to display the individual assets that make up the project. For more information about Forest Service GAOA projects visit our website: https://www.fs.usda.gov/managing-land/gaoa
descript.purpose: This dataset is a spatial data layer of points representing the approximate or general location where the project takes place. The point location is intended for use in small scale maps to indicate the general location of the projects across the country. The location is data is maintained by staff on the individual National Forest or Grass land using the Infra Project Module. Because a project can be made up of many assets distributed across a land area, a single project location point will not always reflect the specific location and extent of the work in the project. The detailed project asset data can be used to meet this need.

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

dataqual.logic: The points in this dataset represent approximate location of projects. The data is intended for use in small scale maps to indicate the general location of the projects across the country. Because a project can be made up of many assets distributed across a large land area, a single project location point will not always reflect the specific location and extent of the work in the project. The project locations are edited by Forest service project staff and the locations are chosen based on what they feel best reflects the location of the project.

procstep.procdesc: The dataset is created by pulling from the Infra NAMP Project Module, FMMI and other internal USFS databases of record.

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Anticipated start date(YYYY/MM/DD)
The status of the project

edom.edomvd: The project has been stopped and is no longer under consideration
Project planning and preparation phases are complete and the project is ready for implementation
The project work has been completed
The project has been put on hold

attr.attrdef: User-defined identifier for the project. It was standardized for FY21 (with a budget code) and FY22 (no budget code, just a number). Until a projects is selected and funded, it will not have a unique budget id.
The user identified longitude for the overall project location

attrdomv.udom: Numerical value for project location longitude

attr.attrdef: Type of project

edom.edomvd: Great American Outdoors Act - Legacy Restoration Fund

attr.attrdef: Concatenated State - County of assets being worked on in project. The Project summary point location does not represent the specific location or extent of the specific asset work within the project and cannot be used to analyze items such as which county or congressional district the project takes place in.

attrdomv.udom: Textual description for assets being worked on in project.

attr.attrdef: Actual start date(YYYY/MM/DD)
User entered into Infra, selected from a standard list of Forest Units
If the project crosses district boundaries, user inputs only the forest level. If the project crosses two forests, user inputs the primary managing (lead) forest
Anticipated finish date(YYYY/MM/DD)
Indicates how the project work items will be accomplished. Force Account means work is accomplished by USFS.
The system generated date the project was last updated

If the project crosses district boundaries, user inputs only the forest level org number. If the project crosses two forests, user inputs the primary managing (lead) forest org number or enters the managing region org number
Populated from the NRM Contacts table based on the Security ID
Populated from the NRM Contacts table based on the Managing Org
Feature geometry.
The estimated total project completion percentage aggregated from costs and completion percentages of all project level and asset level tasks.

This reflects the amount of money estimated and asked for for both transportation and non-transpiration asset tasks. Projects may be over or under their estimated and approved funding levels. If this is a GAOA Project, this value represents GAOA dollars.
The system generated unique identifier for the project. Use the PROJECT_CN to join to the PROJ_CN in the Infra_NAMP_Project_Detail layers as it as a unique record identifier.
A brief description of the project

The impacted congressional districts, derived from included assets. The project summary point location does not represent the specific location or extent of the specific asset work within the project and cannot be used to analyze items such as which county or congressional district the project takes place in.
Sum of all Expenditures and Disbursements recorded in the financial transaction system. If this is a GAOA Project, this value represents GAOA dollars and partner dollars, if any.
The user identified latitude for the overall project location

attrdomv.udom: Numerical value for project location latitude

attr.attrdef: Actual finish date(YYYY/MM/DD)
The estimated amount of deferred maintenance addressed through this project upon completion. If this is a GAOA Project, this value represents DM addressed by GAOA dollars and partner dollars, if any.

The amount of total GAOA-LRF funds for the project released to date and approved for transportation asset tasks associated with this project. If a project is receiving funds in multiple years, the outyear funds are not included.

User-defined name for the project. For projects preloaded from the FY21 or FY22 GAOA list or the FY22 CIM list, the project names come from the NAMP project submissions and congressionally approved project lists. For new projects initiated in IPM the project name is defined by the user and can be edited.
Sum of all obligated dollars for the project where the WorkPlan Code = GNA. If this is a GAOA Project, this value represents GAOA dollars and partner dollars, if any.
The status of approval for the project

edom.edomvd: The Regional Office has approved the project
The Forest Supervisor's Office has approved the project
The Washington Office has approved and funded the project

attr.attrdef: The amount of total GAOA-LRF funds for the project released to date and approved for transportation asset tasks associated with this project. If a project is receiving funds in multiple years, the outyear funds are not included.
Derived from the user entered Security ID in Infra where Region is represented by the first 2 digits
Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The fiscal year the project was selected and approved for national funding, whether through CIM, FLTP, or GAOA
The unique budget ID assigned to the GAOA project in the financial transaction system
Comma separated list of types of assets included in this project.
Populated from the NRM Contacts table based on the Region
The approval date is the date the project was approved at the level/status populated in "Approval Status" field
Sum of all obligated dollars for the project where the WorkPlan Code = CON. If this is a GAOA Project, this value represents GAOA dollars and partner dollars, if any.

distinfo.distliab: The U.S. Forest Service makes no warranty, express or implied, nor assumes any liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness, or utility of these geospatial data or for the improper or incorrect use of those data. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible for verifying the limitations of the geospatial data and for using the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
